name: Gibraltar (civil ensign)

colors.symbolism: the Union Flag canton and the Gibraltar castle
details of the Gibraltar arms (the key)

description: A British Red Ensign with the Union Flag in the canton, defaced in the fly with the Gibraltar coat of arms — a red castle with a yellow key hanging from the gate, on a white shield.
history: The civil ensign of Gibraltar is the Red Ensign defaced with the territory's historic coat of arms (granted by Isabella I of Castile in 1502).

features.role: Coat of arms of Gibraltar (castle and key)
